specific_mechanism: Die-link analysis: each coin die produces a distinctive impression; numismatic provenance reconstructed by spectrum of die signatures across batches
llm_application: LLM model provenance via fingerprint spectrum: each fine-tuned variant carries die-link-like activation signatures; allocation distinguishes provenance by spectrum.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes numismatics spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
